items.name: safeguard

experts.name: Neo
responsibilities: Has the power to veto any suggestion that is inaccurate or harmful
Validates that suggestions reference real code from the diff
Rejects hallucinated or fabricated suggestions

experts.name: Trinity
responsibilities: Verifies code suggestions compile and are syntactically correct
Checks that suggested code blocks are valid replacements
Validates language-specific syntax rules

experts.name: Morpheus
responsibilities: Validates logical correctness of suggestions
Checks for edge cases and error handling
Ensures suggestions do not introduce new bugs

experts.name: Oracle
responsibilities: Reviews code style and readability improvements
Checks consistency with project conventions
Validates naming and formatting suggestions

experts.name: Niobe
responsibilities: Makes the final decision when experts disagree
Weighs the severity and impact of each suggestion
Ensures the overall quality of the review output

items.decisionProcess: Neo has VETO power. Remaining experts vote. Niobe breaks ties.

items.name: classifier

experts.name: Morpheus
responsibilities: Performs initial classification of suggestions by category
Assigns severity levels based on impact analysis
Groups related suggestions together

experts.name: Trinity
responsibilities: Verifies classification accuracy from Morpheus
Cross-checks severity assignments against codebase context
Identifies misclassified or borderline suggestions

experts.name: Oracle
responsibilities: Resolves disagreements between Morpheus and Trinity
Produces the final consensus classification
Ensures consistent categorization across all suggestions

items.decisionProcess: Morpheus classifies, Trinity verifies, Oracle resolves disagreements.
